name: LinkedIn + Email Multi-Touch Sequence
description: Automated LinkedIn connection → message → email follow-up sequence with reply detection and auto-pause.

client_variables.linkedin_profile_url: Client's LinkedIn profile to send from

setup_steps: Set up PhantomBuster LinkedIn session cookie
Create Sales Navigator search with client's ICP
Build n8n workflow: PhantomBuster → delay → LinkedIn message → email fallback
Set up OpenAI personalization for connection notes and messages
Configure reply detection webhook to auto-pause sequence
Set daily LinkedIn action limits (20-30 connections/day)
Create Instantly campaign for email follow-up leg
Launch with monitoring for LinkedIn warnings

sequence.action: Send connection request with personalized note
If accepted, send intro DM with value prop
If no LinkedIn reply, send email referencing LinkedIn connection
Follow-up email with case study or relevant insight
